critical_finding.details: Repos Xenith, bashrc, Canonical-EOD-Report, ashtangayogacork.ie use 'master' as default branch but setup.sh distributes workflows hardcoded for 'main'. Version files added in iteration 52 should persist but workflows will be overwritten.
critical_finding.impact: 4 repos will never have working CI until setup.sh is modified to detect default branch or repos are migrated to main branch
critical_finding.recommended_fix: Modify dmzoneill/dmzoneill setup.sh to query default branch via gh api repos/{owner}/{repo} --jq .default_branch and use that in workflow template
critical_finding.mitigation_applied: Added version files to all 4 blocked repos - this fixes missing version errors in CI runs
